results.rendered_html:
aśmarī [aśmānaṃ rāti rā-ka gaurā˚ ṅīṣ] (In medicine) A disease called stone (in the bladder), gravel, strangury.
Comp.
— ghnaḥ N. of the tree varuṇa (used as a lithontriptic).
— bhedanaṃ a lithontriptic.
— haraḥ N. of the tree Pentaptera Arjuna, used as a lithontriptic.
